headline: FedEx Plays Game Of Chicken With Parcel Shippers' Budgets
summary: The hole that FedEx Corp. finds itself in is, in some respects, not of its own digging. It can't force people to accept job offers, nor can it control the wages its competitors are willing to pay. It can't stop or slow the unprecedented surge in parcel-delivery volumes that have pulled forward demand projections by nearly three years.
